zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Drury於大約1616年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Obedia "Obed" Drury37歲，母親Olivia Rice25歲。他於1646年之前與Lydia Rice在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1689年7月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓享年74歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓金斯 查阿培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Drury于大约1616年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Obedia "Obed" Drury37岁，母亲Olivia Rice25岁。他于1646年之前与Lydia Rice在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1689年7月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓享年74岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓金斯 查阿培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Drury was born about 1616, in England, his father, Sir Obedia "Obed" Drury, was 37 and his mother, Olivia Rice, was 25. He married Lydia Rice before 1646, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 6 July 1689, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 74, and was buried in Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Drury est né environ 1616, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Obedia "Obed" Drury, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Olivia Rice, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lydia Rice avant 1646, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1689, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Drury è nato il circa 1616 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Obedia "Obed" Drury, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Olivia Rice, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lydia Rice prima del 1646, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 6 luglio 1689, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Druryが約1616年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Obedia "Obed" Druryは37歳，母Olivia Riceは25歳であった。1646年以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでLydia Riceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1689年7月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンで74歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンキングズ チャペルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Drury(이)가 대략 1616년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Obedia "Obed" Drury(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Olivia Rice(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1646년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Lydia Rice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1689년 7월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 킨그스 차플에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Drury nasceu aproximadamente 1616, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Obedia "Obed" Drury, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Olivia Rice, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lydia Rice antes 1646, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 6 de julho de 1689, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Drury родился около 1616 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Obedia "Obed" Drury было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Olivia Rice, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lydia Rice перед 1646 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 6 июля 1689 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности кингс чапел, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Drury nació aproximadamente 1616, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Obedia "Obed" Drury, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Olivia Rice, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lydia Rice antes de 1646, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 6 de julio de 1689, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
